131.title: Expansion/Inflation

choices: Her mother comes in and see's her with a big inflated belly.
1311.content:
Rosie has been waiting weeks for this day! Today she was finally able to try something she dreamed about for a very long time.

It all began with a dream of Rosie. In this dream she had a belly as big as a balloon. She was HUGE! And strangely she liked it to be big. Sadly she hadnt the chance to enjoy her bigness because she woke up then.

But then she decided to find a way to make her belly big again.
It took a while but then she saw someone inflating a balloon with a footpump and that was the help she needed.
So she got herself a footpump and then she waited for the right momend where she could finally try it.

Now here she was in her room, her mother already wished her a good night and she was laying in her bed pretending to go to sleep till her mother left the room.
Then she waited a few minutes and then slipped out of her bed. She already prepared everything before going to bed so she was only wearing some panties and the pump was ready under her bed.
Now she took the pump from under her bed and pulled her panties down so that she was completely naked.
Then she grabbed the hose and plugged it into her butt.

And now came the big momend.

Rosie put her foot on the pump and pushed it down.

Instantly she felt how the air entered her butt and her belly rounded a bit.

She gasped and put a hand on her belly. "It works! It really works!"

She stomped on the pump again and again and her belly got rounder and bigger as more and more air entered her butt.
Rosie kept pumping and she got bigger and rounder until her belly was as big as a beachball and Rosie couldnt believe how big she was.

"I'm huge!" She panted and stroked her hands over her balloon-like belly. "So incredible huge!"

She looked at the pump even when she had to turn a bit to the side so that her huge belly didnt blocked the view.

"Hmmm, should i get bigger?" She wondered. "Or should i just enjoy my big belly?"

info.description:
In this interactive, we can use any characters from any form of literature, movie, or animation.

What is contained in this interactive is: Shorta & Loli

What is allowed in this interactive are the following:

          Age digression for adults if wanted [Note: Do keep as a separate thing when making chapters]
          Adult x Shorta / Loli
          Inflation / Expansions
          Weight gain

Food, object, flattenings, etc

What is NOT allowed:

Thank you all for attending the Interaction and hope you enjoy it!

Also a quick note, please don't do One line sentences or one-word chapters. please flesh it out before posting,
